title: About
text:
Welcome to my personal and academic blog. Here you can find:

Academic Work: Insights and findings from my ongoing research and studies.
Synaptic Static: A series of music reviews exploring different genres and styles.
Random Thoughts: A space for reflections on various topics.

For more information about my professional background and projects, please visit my main website at conair94.github.io.

title: Synaptic Static: Introduction
text: Welcome to Synaptic Static, my series for music reviews. Stay tuned for my first review!

title: Initial Random Thoughts
text: A space for miscellaneous thoughts and reflections. Still deciding on a final name for this category!
